name: GOLFTEC Sorrento Valley
about: GOLFTEC is a national golf instruction and fitting provider utilizing advanced technology like OPTIMOTION swing tracking, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to offer personalized coaching and club fitting services. Their indoor facilities are designed for data-driven improvement, with certified coaches creating customized lesson plans and fitting sessions that can reportedly add 21 more yards on average. The Sorrento Valley location currently appears to be inactive as its specific page returns a 'Page Not Found' error, though it is listed as part of the broader GOLFTEC network.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using advanced technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors
Expert PGA-certified coaching with a focus on personalized, long-term improvement plans
Comprehensive club fitting services using data to optimize equipment performance

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but GOLFTEC also provides clubs for lessons and fittings. They offer club rentals and have an on-site pro shop.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service at GOLFTEC locations, so outside food and drinks may not be permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes in a simulator bay can vary, but typical sessions range from 1 to 2 hours depending on the simulator software and player pace.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers junior programs and lessons, but specific amenities for children are not detailed. Contact your local center for information on family-friendly services.
